prestazioni: Engine swap to 2GR-FKS (3.5L V6, direct-injection, 315hp stock) with HKS GT-SS turbo kit (Garrett GTX3582R turbo, HKS 264°/264° camshafts, HKS titanium wastegate, HKS 750cc injectors, and HKS EVC6 boost controller) targeting 450whp on E85 fuel with a custom ECU flash via Haltech Elite 2500

Full drivetrain reinforcement with OS Giken Super Lock LSD (4.30 final drive ratio), TRD 8th-gen Camry GRMN driveshaft, and KAAZ 2-way clutch-type limited-slip differential for the 6-speed U661E automatic transmission, paired with a PTT Performance Stage 3 valve body and torque converter

Suspension overhaul with Tein Flex Z coilovers (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear springs, 24-way adjustable dampers), Cusco front strut tower bar, Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (22mm), and SuperPro poly bushings (control arms, subframe, and differential mounts) for RWD-inspired handling dynamics
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (fiberglass fenders, carbon fiber front bumper, and rear diffuser) with custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap and JDM-spec Toyota Gazoo Racing (GR) badging

Work Emotion CR Kiwami 18x9.5 +35 wheels (ET35) with 245/40R18 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires, paired with DBA 5000 Series rotors, Project Mu G12S pads, and stainless steel braided lines for track-ready braking

Interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III reclining bucket seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved), Takata Drift III 4-point harnesses, NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub, and custom carbon fiber dashboard overlay with AiM MXS Strada digital dash display
